SEE IT IN ACTION

Smart living,
beautifully demonstrated.

Take a closer look at the OHOME — a factory-built secondary dwelling engineered for the way we live now.

One home.
Designed your way.

Custom-engineered furniture and integrated smart technology make 60 sqm feel closer to 100 sqm of fully liveable space. Every room transforms to match how you live — morning to night.

Lounge Mode
Zen Mode
Movie Mode
Work Mode
Rest Mode

Beautifully designed.
Born smart.

60 sqm secondary dwelling engineered for adaptability — Scandinavian design, biophilic finishes, and a fully integrated smart living system powered by LG ThinQ. Everything included as standard.

01
Smart Home OS

LG ThinQ integrated ecosystem — climate, lighting, appliances and security working as one intuitive system.

02
Dynamic Living Spaces

Two personal spaces transform between Lounge, Rest and Work modes via bespoke OHOME furniture.

03
7-Star+ Energy Design

NCC-aligned thermal efficiency. Double-glazed full-height windows. Solar and battery ready as standard.

04
Fully Furnished Turnkey

Drift Lounge, Elevate Desk, LG Smart TV and all major appliances — included. Move in immediately.

05
Premium Kitchen

Stone benchtops, integrated LG appliances, smart extraction rangehood and fold-out dine-in island.

06
Factory Precision Built

237 quality-assurance checkpoints. Engineered heavy-duty steel structure with a 10-year structural warranty.

EVERYTHING INCLUDED

Delivered ready
to live in.

No upgrades. No add-on packages. No surprises. Every OHOME arrives complete and ready for the first night.

Delivered ready to live in
Fully furnished, complete with integrated LG smart appliances package.
Scandinavian design
Functional, high-quality craftsmanship and finishes throughout.
Two dynamic living spaces
Featuring two convertible bedrooms, home offices and theatres.
One bathroom laundry
Floor-to-ceiling tiled with smart washer-dryer combo.
Zone climate control
Personalised comfort in every room.
Smart dine-in kitchen
Stone benchtops, integrated LG appliances and fold-out island.

OHOME isn't a home that became smart — it's a home that was born smart. From the start, every connected appliance and device works together through the OHOME Operating System, powered by LG ThinQ. Entertainment, climate, lighting, appliances and security connect seamlessly, creating a single, intuitive living experience.

Technology is built into the structure, not added later — simple, reliable, and always working in the background. Your OHOME learns from daily patterns to optimise comfort and efficiency, adjusting light, sound and temperature automatically while coordinating the everyday essentials.

FLOOR PLAN — OHOME 062 · 2026 SERIES

Engineered for
every way of living.

Built in 20 sqm modules. Start at 20. Add as many as your block allows. Each OHOME is built around an intelligent central service core — kitchen, bathroom and laundry — flanked by fully adaptable living spaces.

  • Module dimensions3.4m × 3.3m × 5.8m
  • Internal ceiling height2.6 metres
  • ConfigurationsFlexible — to suit your block
  • Add-ons availableRoof Deck · Solar · Terrace · Pergola · Ramp
SIX EXAMPLE LAYOUTS

Every block is different. Every layout adapts.

Engineered for flexibility — six modular configurations built around an intelligent central living core, responding to site, solar orientation, lifestyle and privacy.

FINANCE PATHWAYS

Made easy to own.

Smart finance built into the solution itself. Three clear pathways to ownership, designed to make an OHOME accessible for more Australians.

01
Construction Finance

Up to 100% construction funding available through one of Australia's Big Four banks. Streamlined application, competitive rates, fast approval.

02
Equity Release Loans

Unlock the value of your home to realise the potential of your backyard. A rented OHOME can pay your home back with interest. Speak to a property manager about rental income, or a home loans specialist about repayments.

03
Deferred Ownership Pathways

No money down. Flexible programs offering shared rental revenue and optional ownership in the future — designed for households who need a smarter way in.

Smart home. Smart design. Smart finance.

Your home.
We handle everything else.

Three steps. Six months. Keys in hand. The most effortless way to own a home in Australia.

01
Design it

Choose your layout, finishes and style. Takes about twenty minutes. No architect needed. No guesswork.

02
We build it

Factory precision. 237 quality checkpoints. Council concierge handled end-to-end. You don't lift a finger.

03
Move in

We deliver, install and connect everything. Two weeks on-site. Six months from order. Fully furnished. Ready to live in.
